case_title: THYKEN ROBERT J JR VS HODGES GARY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THYKEN ROBERT J JR AS TO DEFENDANT HODGES GARY ASG LIFE AND HEALTH INSURANCE SERVICES INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THYKEN ROBERT J JR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HODGES GARY ASG LIFE AND HEALTH INSURANCE SERVICES INC BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
